revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月二十]][[zh:七月二十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月二十]][[zh:七月二十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月二十]][[zh:七月二十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月二十]][[zh:七月二十]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 20|qq=July 20}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shuchō|en|Shuchō|qid=Q777413|lt=Shuchō|1=Shuchō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}} , {{ill|686|en|686|qid=Q30619|lt=686|1=686}} ) – The era name was changed to Shuchō; it remained in use until {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q335181}} 's passing on {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}} of the same year. * Year 1 of {{ill|Kankō|en|Kankō|qid=Q2736722|lt=Kankō|1=Kankō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 8|en|August 8|qid=Q2780|lt=August 8|1=August 8}} , {{ill|1004|en|1004|qid=Q5049|lt=1004|1=1004}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Chōhō (era)|en|Chōhō (era)|qid=Q1324844|lt=Chōhō|1=Chōhō (era)}} to Kankō. * Year 2 of {{ill|Genkyū|en|Genkyū|qid=Q1194276|lt=Genkyū|1=Genkyū}} (Intercalary 7th month, Julian calendar {{ill|September 6|en|September 6|qid=Q2858|lt=September 6|1=September 6}} , {{ill|1205|en|1205|qid=Q5229|lt=1205|1=1205}} ) – {{ill|Makishi Incident|ja|牧氏事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Makishi Incident|1=Makishi Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11570455}} : The first {{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|qid=Q1045904|lt=Shikken|1=Shikken}} , {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|en|Hōjō Tokimasa|qid=Q589811|lt=Hōjō Tokimasa|1=Hōjō Tokimasa}} , was expelled by his children, {{ill|Hōjō Masako|en|Hōjō Masako|qid=Q463961|lt=Hōjō Masako|1=Hōjō Masako}} and {{ill|Hōjō Yoshitoki|en|Hōjō Yoshitoki|qid=Q1028811|lt=Hōjō Yoshitoki|1=Hōjō Yoshitoki}} , leading to Yoshitoki becoming the second {{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|qid=Q1045904|lt=Shikken|1=Shikken}} . * Year 1 of {{ill|Chōkyō|en|Chōkyō|qid=Q968843|lt=Chōkyō|1=Chōkyō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 9|en|August 9|qid=Q2782|lt=August 9|1=August 9}} , {{ill|1487|en|1487|qid=Q6652|lt=1487|1=1487}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Bunmei|en|Bunmei|qid=Q1193544|lt=Bunmei (era)|1=Bunmei}} to Chōkyō due to war and epidemics.
== Births == * Year 4 of {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 30|en|August 30|qid=Q2818|lt=August 30|1=August 30}} , {{ill|1627|en|1627|qid=Q6833|lt=1627|1=1627}} ) – {{ill|Itō Jinsai|en|Itō Jinsai|qid=Q640808|lt=Itō Jinsai|1=Itō Jinsai}} , Confucian scholar (d. {{ill|1705|en|1705|qid=Q6830|lt=1705|1=1705}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}} , {{ill|1751|en|1751|qid=Q7615|lt=1751|1=1751}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Yōzan|ja|上杉鷹山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Yōzan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 上杉治憲|1=Uesugi Harunori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1194899}} , also known as {{ill|Uesugi Harunori|en|Uesugi Harunori|qid=Q1194899|lt=Uesugi Harunori|1=Uesugi Harunori}} , lord of {{ill|Yonezawa Domain|en|Yonezawa Domain|qid=Q1037948|lt=Yonezawa Domain|1=Yonezawa Domain}} (d. {{ill|1822|en|1822|qid=Q6983|lt=1822|1=1822}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Shōchō|en|Shōchō|qid=Q1193070|lt=Shōchō|1=Shōchō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 30|en|August 30|qid=Q2818|lt=August 30|1=August 30}} , {{ill|1428|en|1428|qid=Q6315|lt=1428|1=1428}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōkō|en|Emperor Shōkō|qid=Q451827|lt=Emperor Shōkō|1=Emperor Shōkō}} , 101st emperor of Japan (b. {{ill|1401|en|1401|qid=Q6110|lt=1401|1=1401}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 21|en|August 21|qid=Q2823|lt=August 21|1=August 21}} , {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} ) – {{ill|Hirano Kuniomi|ja|平野国臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirano Kuniomi|1=Hirano Kuniomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11483648}} , samurai of {{ill|Fukuoka Domain|en|Fukuoka Domain|qid=Q208766|lt=Fukuoka Domain|1=Fukuoka Domain}} (b. {{ill|1828|en|1828|qid=Q7570|lt=1828|1=1828}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 21|en|August 21|qid=Q2823|lt=August 21|1=August 21}} , {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} ) – {{ill|Furutaka Shuntarō|ja|古高俊太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furutaka Shuntarō|1=Furutaka Shuntarō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11411767}} , imperialist loyalist (b. {{ill|1829|en|1829|qid=Q7572|lt=1829|1=1829}} ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}} , {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|en|Tokugawa Iemochi|qid=Q348466|lt=Tokugawa Iemochi|1=Tokugawa Iemochi}} , 14th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. {{ill|1846|en|1846|qid=Q7640|lt=1846|1=1846}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}} , {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} ) – {{ill|Komatsu Kiyokado|en|Komatsu Kiyokado|qid=Q703847|lt=Komatsu Kiyokata|1=Komatsu Kiyokado}} , samurai and politician of {{ill|Satsuma Domain|en|Satsuma Domain|qid=Q676187|lt=Satsuma Domain|1=Satsuma Domain}} (b. {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|19|7|21|6|20|8|7|0720|qq=}}
